creator: spencer_minear@securecomputing.com
text:
Clearly 113300 is a duplicate of 112297.  I thought I had hit an error
in my browser and the first submit had failed, so I sent the request
again without waiting to see if the reply arrived.  Clearly that was a
mistake on my part, sorry for the duplication.

-- Spence
